title: selliguea crassirhizoma
intro: Selliguea crassirhizoma, also known as Polypodium crassirhizoma, is a type of plant species in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea crassirhizoma include improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts for consumption, or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
